name: SubtitleForge

expressionCurves.target: SUBTITLE/ADBE Text Properties/ADBE Text Animators/ADBE Text Animator/ADBE Text Selectors/ADBE Text Selector/ADBE Text Percent Start
TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Shape - Rect/ADBE Vector Rect Size
TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Shape - Rect/ADBE Vector Rect Roundness
TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke/ADBE Vector Stroke Color
TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke/ADBE Vector Stroke Width
TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill/ADBE Vector Fill Color
TXTBox/ADBE Root Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Group/ADBE Vectors Group/ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill/ADBE Vector Fill Opacity

notes: HEADLESS script: no ScriptUI dialog, screenshot not applicable.

Context for time-based curves: comp 1920x1080, 15 s, 24 fps; SUBTITLE markers at t=1 (dur=3 s) and t=6 (dur=3 s); Subtitle Setup defaults: Box Roundness=10, Box Color=0.1, Stroke Color=[1,0,0], Shadow Color=[0,0,0], Stroke=1, Shadow=1, Spread=0, Size=5, Distance=10, Angle=135.
SUBTITLE/ADBE Text Document: expression returns string text content — no numeric curve. Expression sets text.sourceText via style API at runtime based on current marker's comment.
Text Percent Start: multi-statement expression computed analytically (Enable Type On checkbox=1; marker at t=1 dur=3 s: linear 0→100% over t=1.0–1.6 s; repeats at t=6.0–6.6 s).
ADBE Vector Shape - Rect/ADBE Vector Rect Roundness: indirect effect pass-through (thisComp.layer("SUBTITLE").effect(...)) — curve generated analytically (y=x linear over 0–100).
Stroke Width: if/else expression analytically: Stroke toggle=1 in context, output equals the Stroke Width slider (y=x over 0–20).
ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill/ADBE Vector Fill Opacity: indirect effect pass-through (thisComp.layer("SUBTITLE").effect(...)) — curve generated analytically (y=x linear over 0–100).
TXTBox ADBE Opacity: if/else marker-gate computed analytically (100 inside marker windows t=1–4 and t=6–9, 0 otherwise).
dropShadow/opacity: if/else expression analytically: Shadow toggle=1 in context, output equals Shadow Opacity slider (y=x over 0–100).
dropShadow/localLightingAngle: indirect effect pass-through (thisComp.layer("SUBTITLE").effect(...)) — curve generated analytically (y=x linear over 0–360).
dropShadow/distance: indirect effect pass-through (thisComp.layer("SUBTITLE").effect(...)) — curve generated analytically (y=x linear over 0–50).
dropShadow/chokeMatte: indirect effect pass-through (thisComp.layer("SUBTITLE").effect(...)) — curve generated analytically (y=x linear over 0–100).
dropShadow/blur: indirect effect pass-through (thisComp.layer("SUBTITLE").effect(...)) — curve generated analytically (y=x linear over 0–100).
